interaction_phrase: welcomed Illinois Governor JB Pritzker to the company's Chicago headquarters
occurrence_sentence: Last week, EeroQ welcomed Illinois Governor JB Pritzker to the company's Chicago headquarters for a tour of its engineering facility and announced financial incentives, which EeroQ recently earned from the State of Illinois, as well as a $1.1M investment commitment EeroQ is making to the State of Illinois.

interaction_phrase: EeroQ's participation in two programs that are part of the Illinois VISTA
occurrence_sentence: The tour of EeroQ's engineering facility – which included a showcase of EeroQ's Wonder Lake prototype quantum computing chip – was followed by a press conference to announce EeroQ's participation in two programs that are part of the Illinois VISTA Initiative.

interaction_phrase: made an equity investment in EeroQ's most recent funding round
occurrence_sentence: Illinois also made an equity investment in EeroQ's most recent funding round through the Illinois INVENT Fund, which is administered by the Illinois Department of Commerce and Economic Opportunity (DCEO) and is designed to support Illinois small businesses in key technology sectors.

interaction_phrase: EeroQ and Conductor announced today
occurrence_sentence: EeroQ and Conductor announced today that they have achieved a breakthrough in accelerating the development of autonomous quantum computing labs with NVIDIA Ising, the first family of open models for quantum computing.

interaction_phrase: awarded the 2025 MSU Startup of the Year
occurrence_sentence: We are absolutely thrilled to share that EeroQ has been awarded the 2025 MSU Startup of the Year, an honor that feels especially meaningful given our deep partnership with Michigan State University.

interaction_phrase: a collaboration between researchers
occurrence_sentence: In a [1999 paper in Science](https://www.science.org/doi/10.1126/science.284.5422.1967), a collaboration between researchers at Bell Labs and Michigan State University proposed that an [electron on liquid helium](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Electron-on-helium_qubit) would make an exceptional quantum computer using the vertical motion of the electron above the helium surface, so-called "Rydberg states" of the electron motion.

interaction_phrase: collaboration with the University of Illinois Chicago
occurrence_sentence: Last year, EeroQ sponsored a collaboration with the University of Illinois Chicago (UIC) undergraduates for a Senior Design Project as a part of an Engineering Design requirement for graduation.

interaction_phrase: UIC being in the Chicagoland area has given our students the opportunity
occurrence_sentence: Spearheading the EeroQ and UIC collaboration, Professor Zizwe Chase stated, "UIC being in the Chicagoland area has given our students the opportunity and privilege to not only visit a preeminent Quantum Start-up, but with the graciousness shown by EeroQ, has allowed our students to work with a real quantum company in a hands-on project.
